description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the scorpil/rust:stable Docker image with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a build job that runs cargo build in the build stage. Add a test job that runs cargo test in the test stage. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs cargo doc then copies the generated documentation with cp -r target/doc public and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches, services, or special rules are required.
